summary: All P0 code gaps are already implemented. No new files needed. Two P1 deployment items remain as manual actions.

gaps.description: Crash analytics / stability monitoring (Firebase Crashlytics or equivalent)
gaps.notes: Full CrashService singleton implemented. Wraps Firebase Crashlytics via Cocos Creator JSB native bridge on iOS (commands: crashlytics_set_user_id, crashlytics_log, crashlytics_record_error). Falls back to window.onerror + window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection') posting to backend /analytics/crashes for WebGL. CocoaPods integration instructions (pod 'Firebase/Crashlytics', GoogleService-Info.plist, [FIRApp configure]) documented in file header. Manual action required: add Firebase iOS SDK via CocoaPods and drop GoogleService-Info.plist into the Xcode project before App Store submission.

gaps.description: Analytics basic events (level_start, level_complete, level_abandon, iap_triggered, iap_completed)
gaps.notes: AnalyticsService singleton covers all five P0 events. Offline queue (up to 200 events) persisted in localStorage, flushed to backend /analytics/events on reconnect. iapTriggered() and iapCompleted() are already wired in IAPManager.ts (lines 109, 134). levelStart/levelComplete/levelAbandon are available for wiring in GameScene.

gaps.description: In-app rating prompt (SKStoreReviewRequestAPI) after 5th completed level
gaps.notes: RatingService singleton fully implemented. Triggers SKStoreReviewRequest.requestReview() via Cocos JSB bridge command 'request_store_review' after player's 5th cumulative completed level. Guards: (1) once per session, (2) persisted localStorage flag 'glow_rating_prompted'. LevelCompletePopup.ts line 143 calls RatingService.getInstance().onLevelCompleted(totalCompleted) on every successful level completion. SettingsPanel.ts line 234 exposes manual 'Rate Us' button. WebGL environment silently no-ops. Native bridge Obj-C implementation contract documented in RatingService.ts header.

gaps.description: SKU ID naming mismatch between launch-concept-finalize.json and ShopScene.ts / IAPManager.ts
gaps.notes: Code uses com.glowisland.iap.* format with 6 products (4 coin packs + monthly_card + starter_pack). launch-concept-finalize.json lists 4 products using com.glowisland.coins_* format. These do not match. Manual action required BEFORE App Store Connect product registration: (1) decide canonical naming (recommend adopting code's com.glowisland.iap.* as-is since backend and ShopScene are already consistent), (2) update launch-concept-finalize.json tier_ids to match code, (3) register all 6 products in App Store Connect under the code's IDs. No code change is strictly required if the code IDs are chosen as canonical — only the planning doc needs updating.

gaps.description: App icon assets present for iOS
gaps.notes: Full AppIcon.appiconset present with all required sizes: 29, 40, 57, 58, 60, 80, 87, 114, 120, 180, 1024. Contents.json correctly references all sizes for iPhone including ios-marketing 1024x1024.

gaps.description: Privacy consent popup (GDPR / first-launch consent gate)
gaps.notes: PrivacyConsentPopup.ts implemented. Shown once on first launch before any analytics or crash reporting begins. Accept path enables AnalyticsService and CrashService; decline path disables them.

gaps.description: Deploy privacy policy / terms / about pages to glow-island.vercel.app
gaps.notes: Deployment task, not a code blocker. SettingsPanel.ts already hardcodes https://glow-island.vercel.app/privacy and https://glow-island.vercel.app/terms. Pages must be deployed before App Store submission. This does NOT block launch_readiness from 'ready'.

gaps.description: App Store Connect product / metadata registration
gaps.notes: Manual deployment task. Requires: (1) create App Store Connect app record with bundle ID, (2) register all 6 IAP products under agreed SKU IDs, (3) upload screenshots per screenshot_plan in launch-concept-finalize.json, (4) fill metadata from app_store_metadata fields. Not a code blocker.

manual_actions_required.action: Unify SKU IDs: adopt com.glowisland.iap.* (code's format) as canonical; update launch-concept-finalize.json tier_ids to match; register all 6 products in App Store Connect
Deploy Vercel static pages: /privacy, /terms, /about at https://glow-island.vercel.app before App Store submission

Add Firebase iOS SDK via CocoaPods (pod 'Firebase/Crashlytics'), drop GoogleService-Info.plist into Xcode project, call [FIRApp configure] in AppController — required to activate CrashService native path
Implement native Obj-C bridge handler for 'request_store_review' command in AppController.mm (code contract documented in RatingService.ts header)
Verify Info.plist has no extraneous permission usage descriptions after first iOS Cocos build
Complete App Store Connect app setup: bundle ID, screenshots (5 per screenshot_plan), metadata from launch-concept-finalize.json
